raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.6":"'Polish' is the entire mandate: eliminate the pervasive over-hedging ('may possibly', 'arguably somewhat', 'we think may perhaps'), excise the three verbatim duplicate sentences (paragraphs 1, 2, and 3 each repeat a sentence word-for-word), repair the broken final sentence that uses 'mismatched' twice, and tighten sentence-level prose throughout — this dimension is fully load-bearing","RX.1":"Polishing must preserve the genuine epistemic caveats (small n, self-report limits) even while pruning the redundant hedges; stripping all uncertainty language would misrepresent the study","RX.2":"Sentence-level rewrites must not inadvertently promote tentative findings to stronger claims than the 28-person qualitative sample can support","RX.3":"Scope is prose improvement only; restructuring sections, adding literature context, or reassessing evidence-claim fit are out of scope","RX.4":"The artifact concerns crowdwork platform integrity; polished language must not frame worker LLM use in ways that could enable platform-side retaliation or harm participant confidentiality","RX.5":"Any rephrasing must keep the stated statistics (n=28, 19 reporters) and the single direct quotation intact and attributable"},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.6: 'Polish' is the entire mandate: eliminate the pervasive over-hedging ('may possibly', 'arguably somewhat', 'we think may perhaps'), excise the three verbatim duplicate sentences (paragraphs 1, 2, and 3 each repeat a sentence word-for-word), repair the broken final sentence that uses 'mismatched' twice, and tighten sentence-level prose throughout — this dimension is fully load-bearing
rationale.RX.1: Polishing must preserve the genuine epistemic caveats (small n, self-report limits) even while pruning the redundant hedges; stripping all uncertainty language would misrepresent the study
rationale.RX.2: Sentence-level rewrites must not inadvertently promote tentative findings to stronger claims than the 28-person qualitative sample can support
rationale.RX.3: Scope is prose improvement only; restructuring sections, adding literature context, or reassessing evidence-claim fit are out of scope
rationale.RX.4: The artifact concerns crowdwork platform integrity; polished language must not frame worker LLM use in ways that could enable platform-side retaliation or harm participant confidentiality
rationale.RX.5: Any rephrasing must keep the stated statistics (n=28, 19 reporters) and the single direct quotation intact and attributable
